text:
Created attachment 256558
patch to mail/p5-Email-Sender

Latest update for p5-Email-Sender.  Needed for recent versions of Bugzilla.

NOTE: I have not done the due diligence to look for what actually changed
in the port, nor have I run poudriere.  I am hoping the maintainer can look
after those tasks.
